description_long: This bird features a robust, slightly hooked beak and a pronounced ruff of brown feathers around its neck, giving it a fierce and alert appearance. Its wings are broad and long, with a gradient of pinkish-brown to white on the flight feathers, and the body is compact with a creamy underside. The head is adorned with spiky, rufous feathers, and the eyes are set forward, enhancing its predatory look. The tail is long and wedge-shaped, with two central feathers extending further than the rest. Its legs are relatively short and pink, ending in sharp talons suitable for grasping prey. The overall plumage pattern is a mix of solid and gradient tones, with the wings and tail showing the most color variation.
description: A fierce-looking bird with a hooked beak, spiky rufous head feathers, broad pinkish wings, and a long wedge-shaped tail. Its body is compact with a creamy underside and pink legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's hooked beak, spiky head feathers, and outstretched wings with a clear view of the creamy underside.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hooked beak, the layered wing feathers, and the wedge-shaped tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full span of the wings, the dark back, and the symmetrical wedge-shaped tail feathers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the beak profile, wing layering, and tail shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid brown head and neck ruff, pinkish-brown wings with white tips, creamy underside, and dark back with a wedge-shaped tail.
